title: St. George Church, Kalady
tagline: St. George Church, Kalady — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St. George Church, Kalady is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. George Church, Kalady is a Christian church situated on the banks of the river Periyar in the Ernakulam district of Kerala, India. The church was established on 20 March 1960. The new church in Kalady, built by the parishioners, was consecrated on 4 March 1984 under the leadership of Fr.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kalady
topPlaces.description: Kalady or Kaladi is a town located between Angamaly and Perumbavoor, east of the Periyar River, near Malayattoor in Ernakulam district of Kerala, India, not far from Cochin International Airport. It is notable as the birthplace of 9th century Indian philosopher Adi Shankara.

topPlaces.name: Mattoor
topPlaces.description: Mattoor is a small town in the Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is situated 2 km (1.2 mi) north of Kalady on MC Road.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkumbhagom
topPlaces.description: Vadakkumbhagom is a village in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kottamam
topPlaces.description: Kottamam is a city situated in the banks of the holy river Periyar in Ernakulam district, Kerala state, south India. It is situated about 9.5 km from Angamaly and 3 km from Kalady, the birthplace of Adi Sankaracharya.

topPlaces.name: Thiru Nayathode Siva Narayana Temple
topPlaces.description: Thiru Nayathode Siva Narayana Temple is located at Nayathod, a small village in Ernakulam District, Kerala, India. The temple is located at about 3 km from Cochin International Airport.

topPlaces.name: Chelamattom Shree Krishna Swami Temple
topPlaces.description: Chelamattom Sree Krishna Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Chelamattom, Kalady, in Ernakulam district, Kerala. This temple is situated near the banks of the Periyar River.

topPlaces.name: Neeleeswaram

topPlaces.name: Thuravoor, Angamaly
topPlaces.description: Thuravoor is a Gram Panchayat in Aluva Taluk of Ernakulam District in the South Indian state of Kerala. Thuravoor Grama Panchayath is nearly 5 km from Angamaly Town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. George Church, Kalady?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. George Church, Kalady is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. George Church, Kalady?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (27 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. George Church, Kalady?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. George Church, Kalady at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. George Church, Kalady?
faq.a: Stays in St. George Church, Kalady start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. George Church, Kalady?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalady, Mattoor, Vadakkumbhagom, Kottamam, Thiru Nayathode Siva Narayana Temple.
